default.heading: Medical Story
default.body: A patient just arrived by ambulance, and it is time to save or roast them.

default.heading: Assign Roles
default.body: Vote to pick the patient, doctor, and nurse. Everyone else becomes a bystander.

default.heading: Four Rounds of Chaos
default.body: Describe the complaint, invent a diagnosis, devise a procedure, and finish the doctor's brag.

default.heading: Vote for the Funniest
default.body: After each phase, vote for your favorite entry. The winning author earns points.

default.heading: The Best Doctor Wins!
default.body: Rack up points across all phases and become the funniest medical mind in the room.
